fix_summary: The booking service correctly restores the 6-hour haul boundary so flights under 6 hours get the short-haul checked-bag fee and flights of 6 hours or more get the long-haul fee, while explicit extra prices still override the default logic. The targeted tests passed, including boundary and override coverage.
approval_reasons: `_is_long_haul` now returns `True` for durations `>= 6 hours`, which matches the acceptance criteria and fixes the inversion at the threshold.

The checked-bag default pricing branch still chooses between `SHORT_HAUL_CHECKED_BAG_FEE` and `LONG_HAUL_CHECKED_BAG_FEE` based on `_is_long_haul`, preserving the existing structure while correcting the logic.
Explicit extra prices remain first-class overrides in `_resolved_extra_price`, so provided baggage prices continue to win over default haul-based pricing.
Automated tests passed: 8/8, including the new short-haul, long-haul, explicit override, and helper boundary cases.
